title: to_csv loses tz info on timezone-aware DatetimeIndex
body: Writing a DataFrame with a tz-aware DatetimeIndex to CSV then reading it back loses the timezone. I get a naive index. Expected: either keep the tz in the formatted string and parse it back, or document that CSV round-trip drops tz.

comments.body: This is by design — CSV has no native tz type. Use `date_format='%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'` on the write side and `parse_dates` with `date_format=` on the read side. We can document this more clearly in the IO docs.
